name: bytechef
description: Open-source platform that unifies AI agent orchestration and workflow automation — autonomy and precision in one platform.
readme_summary: ByteChef is an open-source platform that unifies AI agent orchestration and workflow automation. It allows for the creation and management of complex AI agents with integrated tools, memory, and guardrails, alongside a visual workflow editor for automating tasks. This platform is designed for enterprises, offering self-hosted deployment and embeddability into other products.
key_features: Streaming and structured output for agents
Native Knowledge Base and RAG with 15+ vector store integrations
MCP (Multi-cloud Platform) integration for tool consumption and exposure
primary_use_case: Unifying AI agent orchestration and workflow automation for enterprise applications, enabling complex AI-driven processes and integrations.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman, the 'ByteChef', standing in a futuristic workshop. In one hand, they hold a glowing, intricate AI brain pulsing with data. With the other hand, they are meticulously assembling a complex, interconnected network of pipes and gears representing workflows. Raw data streams (visualized as colorful energy) flow into the AI brain, and the assembled workflows then precisely direct and transform these energies into polished, finished products exiting the workshop. Subtle UI elements showing agent configurations and workflow steps are visible on holographic displays around the craftsman. The overall scene is clean, modern, and vibrant, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style.

name: PokieTicker
readme_summary: PokieTicker is a Python application that helps users understand the 'why' behind stock price movements by integrating news events directly onto candlestick charts. It allows for filtering news by impact type, finding similar historical events, and uses AI to explain price changes and predict future trends based on news sentiment and technical indicators.
primary_use_case: To provide stock market beginners with an event-driven understanding of stock price fluctuations by correlating news events with price movements and offering AI-driven explanations and predictions.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, perched on a branch made of a candlestick chart, holding a magnifying glass over a cluster of glowing news icons. The owl's eyes are bright screens displaying sentiment analysis graphs and AI-generated explanations. Below, a stream of digital particles representing news data flows into the chart, causing subtle shifts in its price line. Small, stylized UI elements showing 'bullish' and 'bearish' indicators are visible on the branch. The background is a soft, abstract representation of a bustling financial market. The overall mood is insightful and educational. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of deep blues, greens, and golden yellows, emphasizing clarity and wisdom.

name: Lastfm-Playing
description: A tool for SVG-Card with last playing tracks on Last.FM, for your readme
readme_summary: This Python tool generates a customizable SVG card displaying a user's most recently played tracks on Last.FM. It's designed to be easily integrated into GitHub README files, providing a dynamic visual representation of listening habits.
key_features: Generates SVG cards for Last.FM playing tracks
Customizable with user and test parameters
primary_use_case: To display a user's currently playing or recently played music tracks from Last.FM as a dynamic SVG image within a GitHub repository's README file.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, modern music player interface seamlessly integrated into a digital billboard displayed on a GitHub repository page. The billboard shows album art and song titles of recently played tracks, with subtle glowing lines connecting them to a central 'Last.FM' logo. Small, abstract data streams flow from the logo to the track information, representing the data fetching and rendering process. The overall mood is clean, digital, and informative, with a color palette inspired by music streaming services. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear iconography and a futuristic aesthetic, subtly featuring the 'Lastfm-Playing' name on a small UI element.

name: arcade_ai
description: Universal multi-provider LLM chat client for Android (Flutter)
readme_summary: Arcade AI is a universal Android chat client that connects to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from various providers. It offers a fluid, secure, and customizable interface for interacting with different AI models, including global, regional, and local options.
primary_use_case: To provide a unified and user-friendly mobile interface for interacting with a wide range of Large Language Models from different providers on Android devices.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a futuristic arcade cabinet. Instead of classic games, the cabinet's screen displays a swirling aurora of data and text, representing different LLM responses. A user's hand, glowing with digital energy, is inserting a single, universal 'API Key' coin into the slot. From the cabinet, multiple distinct streams of light, each with a unique color and pattern, flow outwards, symbolizing connections to diverse AI models like OpenAI, Google Gemini, and Ollama. The overall mood is sleek, modern, and slightly mysterious, emphasizing the 'Arcade AI' name subtly integrated into the cabinet's design. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, neon-accented color palette.

name: mesh-market
readme_summary: Mesh Market is a decentralized file synchronization tool that allows users to sync folders directly between their own devices without a central server. It uses various peer-to-peer technologies for discovery and secure data transfer, ensuring end-to-end encryption.
key_features: Cross-platform support (Android, iOS, macOS, Linux, Windows)
primary_use_case: Synchronizing files and folders directly between personal devices without relying on cloud storage or a central server.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant 3D isometric illustration depicting a network of interconnected personal devices (laptops, phones, tablets) acting as individual islands. Glowing, secure data streams, visualized as crystalline pathways, flow directly between these islands, bypassing any central hub. Each island has a small, stylized folder icon. Subtle digital particles and a clean, modern aesthetic convey secure, direct data transfer. The overall mood is one of secure, private, and seamless connectivity. The repository name 'Mesh Market' is subtly integrated into the scene, perhaps as a small signpost on one of the islands. The color palette is a mix of cool blues and greens with glowing accents.
